nasb.text: So these days were to be remembered and celebrated throughout every generation, every family, every province and every city; and these days of Purim were not to fail from among the Jews, or their memory fade from their descendants.

esv.text: that these days should be remembered and kept throughout every generation, in every clan, province, and city, and that these days of Purim should never fall into disuse among the Jews, nor should the commemoration of these days cease among their descendants.

cnv.text: 使人在各省各城，家家戶戶，世世代代，都記念、遵守這兩日，使這普珥節的日子在猶大人中，永不廢止，在他們的後裔中也不斷被記念。

ccb.text: 各省各城、家家户户、世世代代都要纪念、遵守这节日，使犹太人永不中断过普珥节，他们的后代也不可忘记。
